Notice of Price Increase 
Effective 11/4/06, customers calling from 
the United States to a mobile number in 
Mexico must dial a "1" after the Mexico 
country code of "52" and before the 
10-digit local number. 
Also, effective 3/1/07, Verizon Long 
Distance will start charging a Premium 
Termination rate of 20 cents per minute for 
calls to Mexico terminating to a mobile or 
wireless number.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date.

service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed -indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added -indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed -indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period

Summary of Long Distance Charges (continued) 
FirmRate Plus Calling Plan 
The IRS announced the federal excise 
tax (Federal Tax) will no longer be 
collected on long distance and bundled 
services, which include VoIP and prepaid 
telephone cards. The Federal Tax will 
continue to apply to local-only service, 
which includes services and facilities 
sold in connection with local service. 
Verizon stopped billing the Federal Tax on 
these nontaxable services for bills issued 
after July 31, 2006. Customers may claim a 
EFTA01243355


credit or refund on their 2006 federal income

PhCnt: 3 of 6 Screen Cnt 329 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 750 9790 667 BILL DATE : 092506 
CARRIER : Verizon Enterprise Sol 
tax return for the Federal Tax paid on 
nontaxable services billed after 02-28-03 
PAGE NO : 8 
and before 08-01-06. Procedures for claiming 
the refund can be found on the IRS website 
(www.irs.gov) .

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added -indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed -indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
Telephone # 2127501176 Billing # 2127509790 
PhCnt: 3 of 6 Screen Cnt 492 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 750 9790 667 BILL DATE : 082506 
CARRIER : Verizon Enterprise Sol PAGE NO : 12 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Important Notice for New York City 
In Oct. 2002, NYC increased the monthly surcharge for administering the 
Enhanced 911 system from 35 cents to 81.00 per telephone line. This increase 
Telephone # 2127501176 Billing # 2127509790 
PhCnt: 3 of 6 Screen Cnt 936 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 750 9790 075 BILL DATE : 042503 
CARRIER : Verizon PAGE NO : 1 
was programmed in the Verizon billing system in Jan. 2003. As a result, 
customers will see past E911 surcharges on this month's bill for Oct. through 
Dec. 2002. This appears on the "Other Credits and Charges" (OCC) page of 
your bill. Verizon is required to collect the E911 surcharge on behalf of NYC.

55.00 or 1.5% per month. To avoid a late payment charge, payment for everythi 
and FiOS TV must be received by the due date for Total New Charges on page 1. 
charges are due within 60 days. Any Basic Local Services and FiOS TV balances 
a late payment charge.

Effective immediately, we are modifying the 
language in your service agreement relating to 
late payment charges.Going forward, the late 
payment charge for customers who have their 
Verizon Enterprise Solutions charges billed 
by their Verizon local carrier will be the 
late payment charge that the local exchange 
carrier applies to overdue charges.If your 
Verizon local carrier changes its Late 
payment charge or methodology, it will notify 
you of those changes. Verizon Enterprise 
Solutions will not separately notify you.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
Telephone # 2128799366 Billing # 2128799366 
PhCnt: 6 of 6 Screen Cnt 189 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 879 9366 828 BILL DATE : 070405 
CARRIER : Verizon Enterprise Sol PAGE NO : 5 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Notice of Price Increase 
Telephone # 2128799366 Billing # 2128799366 
PhCnt: 6 of 6 Screen Cnt 246 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 879 9366 828 BILL DATE : 060405 
CARRIER : Verizon Enterprise Sol 
Effective 07/16/05, Long Distance Message 
Telecommunications Service (LDMTS) in-state and 
interstate rates will increase from 30 cents to 
35 cents/min. in mileage band 1 (0-3500 miles) 
and from 34 cents to 35 cents/min. 
in mileage band 2 (3501-5500 miles), 
peak and off-peak. International Message 
Telecommunications Service (IMTS) rates will 
increase 5 percent for calls to all countries. 
LDMTS/IMTS rates apply if you are not 
enrolled in an optional calling plan (OCP). 
For specific rates or OCP information, call 
our business office.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge;

the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

EFTA01244124


Effective February 19, 2005, Verizon Enterprise 
Solutions is adding Premium Termination rates 
for calling to certain countries including 
Hungary and New Zealand. Verizon Enterprise 
Solutions charges a Premium Termination rate 
to recover the fees many foreign 
telecommunications companies impose on us for 
terminating calls they designate as Premium 
(e.g., calls to mobile numbers) . Premium 
Termination rates are 20 cents per minute more 
than international calls to non-Premium numbers. 
If you would like more information about Premium 
Termination rates and/or to find out specific 
rates, please contact us at the number on this 
bill. 
Fraud Protection 
Telephone /I 2128799366 Billing it 2128799366 
PhCnt: 6 of 6 Screen Cnt 459 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 879 9366 828 BILL DATE : 020405 
CARRIER : Verizon Enterprise Sol PAGE NO : 5 
As a valued customer and as part of Verizon 
Enterprise Solutions' ongoing effort to educate 
our customers, Verizon would like to make you 
aware of an industry wide problem that is 
increasingly affecting more and more businesses 
that own or operate Customer Premises Equipment 
(CPE). The problem occurs when hackers 
fraudulently access equipment such as a 
PBX-based voicemail system, or other types of 
CPE and then make numerous outbound calls, 
typically to international locations. Your CPE 
may be vulnerable to hacking and unauthorized 
use if you have not taken the proper precautions 
to prevent such hacking. If you have not 
already taken such precautions, please contact 
the vendor from whom you have purchased your

PhCnt: 6 of 6 Screen Cnt 460 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 879 9366 828 
CARRIER : Verizon Enterprise Sol 
CPE immediately and inquire about ways you can 
protect your equipment. Please contact your 
Verizon office if you have any questions.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
Telephone # 2128799366 Billing # 2128799366 
PhCnt: 6 of 6 Screen Cnt 630 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 879 9366 828 BILL DATE : 100404 
CARRIER : Verizon Enterprise Sol PAGE NO : 6 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
$31.00 
EFTA01244223


service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge.

Explanation of Type-Date 
EFTA01244274


M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added -indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed -indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Total monthly recurring s non-recurring charges 
Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
EFTA01244313


removing service; the dates reflect the period

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
537.20 
537.20 
EFTA01244330


removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
EFTA01244373


Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
EFTA01244423


Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge.

removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

8.Federal Access Charge M-05/15/01 $3.40 
Total Switched Outbound 540.80

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
EFTA01244532


the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Important Notice for New York City 
In Oct. 2002, NYC increased the monthly surcharge for administering the 
Enhanced 911 system from 35 cents to $1.00 per telephone line. This increase 
placed from withi 
Verizon telephone 
Telephone # 2128799366 Billing # 2128799366 
PhCnt: 6 of 6 Screen Cnt 1508 
ACCOUNT NUMBER : 212 879 9366 828 BILL DATE : 050403 
CARRIER : Verizon PAGE NO : 1 
was programmed in the Verizon billing system in Jan. 2003. As a result, 
customers will see past E911 surcharges on this month's bill for Oct. through 
Dec. 2002. This appears on the "Other Credits and Charges" (OCC) page of 
your bill. Verizon is required to collect the E911 surcharge on behalf of NYC.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added -indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed -indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added -indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed -indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date. 
Added-indicates partial month charge for added 
service; the dates reflect the period covered 
EFTA01244633


by the charge. 
Removed-indicates partial month credit for 
removing service; the dates reflect the period 
covered by the credit.

Explanation of Type-Date 
M-indicates monthly recurring charge; 
the date is the original installation date. 
N-indicates a non-recurring charge; 
the date is the service request date.
